summary: Soundboard source with presumed good audio quality; fans love the performance, especially Phil's vocal enthusiasm.
review: Both reviewers gave this recording top marks, highlighting a heartfelt vibe (“Thanks for playing while I was being born”) and noting Phil Lesh’s full‑on backing vocals as a unique treat. No specific comments on sound clarity were provided, but the .sbd tag suggests a standard soundboard capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 5‑star reviews praising the show and vocal performance; absence of criticism leads to a high rating, though limited detail lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks on audio clarity; assumed typical soundboard quality without noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviews did not discuss set structure or specific songs.

band_member_comments.Phil: Described as “all in for the backing vocals” delivering a unique version.
